# YOUR CODE HERE
def main():
    import sys
    input = sys.stdin.read
    S, T = input().split()
    
    i = j = 0
    result = []
    
    while i < len(S) and j < len(T):
        if S[i] == T[j]:
            result.append(j + 1)
            i += 1
            j += 1
        else:
            j += 1
    print(' '.join(map(str, result)))

main()
